rationales.81f301ab327c6b3c10d8b23878f382d3: This paper addresses important safety considerations for rituximab use in women planning or undergoing pregnancy.
rationales.8f74f55a5ffdbf102e55a123fa031090: This paper establishes the foundational understanding of B-cells as key disease drivers and therapeutic targets in MS.
rationales.ab642b9255f962f00084042f2154bb2b: This study provides specialized insight into the pathological role of meningeal B-cell follicles in progressive MS.
rationales.b5e4140f626ba592e0f8040b9e63f18c: This review marks the entry into an era of B-cell therapy, highlighting its effectiveness across MS forms.
rationales.c64b243a85cfddaecd548fbccfea7f49: This recent review offers a comprehensive update on anti-CD20 therapies, covering pathology, clinical applications, and newer agents.
rationales.c8f4c7d0c541747d0d35a84a463a49fb: This paper explores the deeper immunological mechanisms of specific B-cell subsets and their role in B-cell depletion therapy.
rationales.dd050edd43edfb032001cbd6c46d638c: This pivotal trial provides early evidence for the efficacy of rituximab in B-cell depletion for relapsing-remitting MS.

rationales.2e6662ce25b2b0d794aa73b2c2006649: This review discusses advanced spinal cord imaging, crucial for understanding the neurological mechanisms underlying bladder and bowel dysfunction.
rationales.36b6f797c345c00e237754d333659aed: This consensus provides foundational guidelines for the assessment and management of bladder symptoms in MS.
rationales.4b507897543694afd32a767f85057185: This review details the prevalence, quality of life impact, and management strategies for neurogenic bowel dysfunction in MS.
rationales.9c4fe72f3611a0b20da3dee38f56cd67: This paper explores patient satisfaction and the bothersome nature of bladder and bowel symptoms, highlighting their quality of life impact.
rationales.a076e268d7706f1a9aa86bbf8cf02558: This paper defines MS clinical courses, providing essential context for understanding bladder and bowel dysfunction across phenotypes.

rationales.0f219b3b7566ca251b64135ad6ff3f3d: Explains the role of autoreactive lymphocytes, key immune cells that cross the compromised BBB to drive MS pathology.
rationales.35298d0e900e990010cc08ec8fd7d9f4: Discusses MRI as a clinical tool for monitoring MS disease activity, which implicitly includes detecting BBB breakdown.
rationales.4d8eb5833eb7e446bc82b41d0aee76db: Examines inflammation and oxidative stress as key pathological consequences of immune cell entry and CNS damage in MS.
rationales.834bfb49ae9fed82e6c36e476b74f714: Delves into a specific molecular mechanism by which microglia regulate BBB integrity in inflammatory demyelination relevant to MS.
rationales.93f0d1384e4a987b20a0677b896ed46a: Focuses on NF-κB, a key inflammatory signaling pathway activated in MS, representing a deeper molecular consequence of CNS inflammation.
rationales.a658576ea70fd9b436f25cc4b62a4c53: Explores the critical link between CNS inflammation, initiated by BBB dysfunction, and subsequent neurodegeneration in MS.
rationales.b4ebe41bd1a03714cf45c362d4bd8f0d: Focuses on T helper cells, a specific and crucial type of lymphocyte involved in CNS inflammation after BBB breach.
rationales.be8ee73d7234208eb47d6eb2fd8b8677: Directly addresses the fundamental process of immune cell transmigration into the CNS in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.c8f4c7d0c541747d0d35a84a463a49fb: Highlights the role of B cells, another significant immune cell type contributing to MS pathogenesis following BBB dysfunction.
rationales.d482c328c19ba5b126673737057a9685: Provides a general understanding of blood-brain barrier function and its breakdown in neurodegeneration.
rationales.e208a93e8b45ce632643d45c56c0b1fb: Explores advanced insights into viral triggers that can drive the inflammatory cascade in MS, a consequence of BBB dysfunction.

rationales.22092527fa6e11b1e5ab3a6336e4353d: This paper describes the pathology of 'smoldering plaques' characterized by microglial activation, which BTK inhibitors aim to address in progressive MS.
rationales.6054b7a4501e736e10cd63667cbcd1cc: This paper presents a key phase 2b clinical trial for tolebrutinib, another brain-penetrant BTK inhibitor, demonstrating its safety and efficacy in relapsing MS.
rationales.69454965c1bbf0799f3e2fc82178c664: This is a foundational clinical trial for evobrutinib, an oral BTK inhibitor, providing early evidence of its efficacy in relapsing MS.
rationales.6ab243ce87f009bef30c91d659f804bc: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of Bruton's tyrosine kinase inhibitors for multiple sclerosis, serving as an excellent introduction to the topic.
rationales.6d8489df9953235b9db14617634bb7f4: This genomic study implicates both peripheral immune cells (like B cells) and microglia in MS susceptibility, offering a broader genetic context for the targets of BTK inhibitors.
rationales.7541612a7ea49f1aa731f605c7158ffa: This paper delves into the specific microglial dysfunction of inefficient myelin debris clearance, which impairs remyelination and is a potential target for BTK inhibitors.
rationales.834bfb49ae9fed82e6c36e476b74f714: This paper uncovers a specific molecular pathway (miR-126a-5p/MMP9 axis) by which microglia regulate blood-brain barrier integrity, a process potentially influenced by CNS-penetrant BTK inhibitors.
rationales.98c83ea8cdcd9c251d383978347cbb0e: This paper demonstrates how modulating macrophage/microglia function can enhance remyelination, providing a mechanistic example relevant to the remyelinating potential of BTK inhibitors.
rationales.b4edb101341ca99cbe8e816c2b026ac2: This paper uses advanced 7T MRI to visualize iron-rim lesions and their association with slowly expanding plaques, offering a deeper insight into smoldering MS pathology targeted by BTK inhibitors.
rationales.e4eb2d213c43c24473852fd14e9840cd: This paper provides a detailed exploration of the roles of microglia and astrocytes in phagocytosis and myelination, offering a deeper cellular understanding of BTK inhibitor targets.
rationales.efc6956c9e379a9fcf5339d12a53a661: This paper introduces the crucial concept that BTK inhibition can promote myelin repair, highlighting a key therapeutic mechanism beyond immune cell modulation.
rationales.f8e4a4f3eb0e944fa80dc7ce99567a25: This review establishes the role of CNS macrophages (microglia) in progressive MS, providing essential context for understanding why BTK inhibitors target these cells.

rationales.10b44f5497cbc0174a5d1ccda9b0e013: Highlights the significant impact and interplay of mood disorders with cognitive impairment in MS patients.
rationales.21fc977feae2d034b603cb7733ebd6c5: Explores a mechanistic understanding of hippocampal dysfunction and a potential therapeutic strategy for cognitive deficits in MS.
rationales.48ea801d9e193594d285cfda9d2871e0: Investigates MRI measures and clinical factors that predict future cognitive decline in MS.
rationales.5c6eb5958ea2fb8239eab3372fbcdf33: Provides essential guidelines for screening, awareness, and management of cognitive symptoms in MS care.
rationales.602de8ec1be83948ae88f76db94194c3: Explores how menopause can influence and overlap with cognitive symptoms in women with MS.
rationales.65ee33999237182f417f4cd2909ea3e8: Introduces and validates a key assessment tool (MACFIMS) for identifying common cognitive deficits in MS.
rationales.6ccba954a51064043eaea2a354f9b730: Demonstrates the enhanced prognostic value of integrating multi-modal biomarkers for early cognitive impairment in MS.
rationales.f6490731cc2485b8c5a48abcd08ba9df: Offers clinical guidance on utilizing NfL as a biomarker for prognosis and treatment monitoring, relevant to neurodegeneration underlying cognitive issues.
rationales.f70e209fc2414ec859d33035ddd60a3a: Provides longitudinal evidence for serum NfL as a biomarker correlating with cognitive performance in MS.
rationales.fec457302ab115a85120859e4b47207d: Addresses the prevalence and impact of cognitive disturbances in the pediatric MS population.

rationales.0a7c16172a6e1a4f0a7cfdf68d4bac0e: Provides a comprehensive overview of current and emerging biomarkers, including NfL, for MS disease activity and progression.
rationales.1305d8d4e76b4e8df3bcbb294c51a669: Delves into the specific methodological aspects and reliability of the K free light chain index for intrathecal synthesis.
rationales.29a5e523cb04dd327a6e5a9c6a22d025: Explores the prognostic utility of NfL and oligoclonal bands in predicting conversion to MS in early disease stages.
rationales.2f7973bb6c1abcdba7fa3f3ba8c267f8: Investigates a broad range of inflammation-related protein biomarkers in both CSF and plasma, offering a wider perspective.
rationales.6ccba954a51064043eaea2a354f9b730: Demonstrates the advanced application of combining blood and imaging biomarkers for predicting cognitive impairment in MS.
rationales.84c7dda1dab6685f12ae301b7dc5d142: Identifies novel predictive autoantibody signatures, representing a cutting-edge approach to biomarker discovery.
rationales.96751ecdaa29c743fd2017ef1166dcc1: Discusses the integration of kappa free light chains and oligoclonal bands into the latest diagnostic criteria for MS.
rationales.a34c385ae845f68d0cdcd5cceec456d6: Investigates the specific autoantibody repertoire in CSF and serum, providing deeper insight into IgG synthesis and OCB.
rationales.dbbce5c55c5eeec69cf326b18f2889ec: Establishes the diagnostic importance of kappa free light chains in CSF for MS, a key biomarker.

rationales.04f56eec510f8885c35dfbf5401822b8: Presents early findings on neurofilament protein in CSF as a potential biomarker for axonal damage and disease activity.
rationales.107100ef01117840ffa15a9c7faab84e: Provides a foundational overview of MS as an inflammatory neurodegenerative disease characterized by demyelination and lesion formation.
rationales.2202f12a53491be9581e74f27eb55741: Establishes axonal loss as a primary driver of irreversible neurological disability in MS.
rationales.3b559471b6d4c5b6fda99a35ae786419: Explores the neural androgen receptor as a potential therapeutic target for stimulating myelin repair in chronic demyelination.
rationales.6149d4340638dc5e38691c640de64d42: Examines the frequency and extent of remyelination specifically within cortical lesions in chronic MS patients.
rationales.7541612a7ea49f1aa731f605c7158ffa: Investigates how inefficient clearance of myelin debris by microglia directly impairs remyelinating processes.
rationales.7e24728d3ff983ef01031c9209c9b0a4: Explores the critical role of inflammation in driving demyelination and neuro-axonal damage in MS.
rationales.ac493a2b3c0e1da06953d27942d421ff: Presents early evidence of acute axonal damage occurring in MS lesions, linking it to permanent disability.
rationales.c036b8ea79fdc6cab8dda54892c64621: Demonstrates the utility of serum neurofilament light chain as a predictor of disease worsening and brain atrophy in MS.
rationales.c904ba4486eb3d1ab3509426087231c9: Introduces the concept of myelin recovery and highlights the significant challenges associated with remyelination in MS.
rationales.d38a701103dc736dc27650680dd6ed33: Offers in situ evidence for specific immune mechanisms, like antibody and complement, in mediating myelin destruction.
rationales.d6ec96bd4c56cb827b47625ed36f2318: Discusses the pathological heterogeneity of MS lesions and its implications for understanding demyelination mechanisms.
rationales.d8533e4b4fe15c58b1d25fa49f856480: Utilizes advanced MRI techniques to quantify and characterize myelin and axon pathology in vivo across different lesion types.
rationales.dbf329a645b2882ad0edfc57b1d5411b: Identifies a specific MS risk gene, Mertk, as crucial for microglial activation and efficient remyelination.
rationales.e4eb2d213c43c24473852fd14e9840cd: Delves into the specific roles of microglia and astrocytes in myelin debris phagocytosis and subsequent remyelination processes.
rationales.ffdc650801631b8452f2f3cb7e113810: Compares the dynamics of demyelination and remyelination, particularly addressing the causes of incomplete remyelination in progressive MS.

rationales.08caccad9a0ca229a22f4550b3dc20a7: This 'State of the Art' review provides a comprehensive overview of neuropsychiatric symptoms, including depression, their diagnosis, and treatment in MS.
rationales.10b44f5497cbc0174a5d1ccda9b0e013: This paper provides a recent overview of depressive symptoms and anxiety, highlighting their impact on quality of life and connection to cognitive impairment in MS.
rationales.1a0536159d73a4a67efe368ef57ed45f: This systematic review and meta-analysis establishes the prevalence of depression and anxiety in MS and their association with disability.
rationales.2def680bfb7f4123cf2964bf2d5faf20: This paper delves into the specialized topic of perinatal depression and anxiety, addressing a unique context for women with MS.
rationales.4d110195d3d5a270332afc6890c82433: This paper provides advanced insights into the etiology, effects, and management of psychiatric disorders as comorbidities in MS.
rationales.602de8ec1be83948ae88f76db94194c3: This review explores the specific effects of menopause on women with MS, including overlapping symptoms like mood disturbances.
rationales.669ba1b5949d8ddb24ebc16a6d1b015d: This evidence-based guideline offers foundational recommendations for the assessment and management of psychiatric disorders in MS patients.
rationales.ba032dd490406d7cc30b8997156b1389: This review examines sex-specific factors and their impact on women with MS across the lifespan, including implications for mood disorders.

rationales.00dcfc8471284767e07f54fda26ce562: Provides evidence for a two-stage model of disability progression, linking early inflammation to later neurodegeneration.
rationales.047a3285ade63589276df8c2ce31e345: Explains how disability is acquired through relapse-associated worsening and progression independent of relapse activity.
rationales.1272531bbe61511e02863f5654c7f02e: Reviews advanced machine learning and MRI-based methods for predicting MS disease progression and outcomes.
rationales.1b84ccb0d4cf9a3c36fe1fe3f93b1064: Offers a comprehensive review of secondary progressive MS, detailing its characteristics and therapeutic challenges.
rationales.38d65ed7107ec8b5091630cf4be49d20: Examines the critical relationship between relapses and the accumulation of long-term disability.
rationales.3bd9e8c227d3165966ef76c53ae2f761: Introduces the concept of 'smouldering MS' as a key pathological driver of insidious disease progression.
rationales.3be219c79ed6acd2d1696e3bbda3da2f: Establishes the updated phenotypic classification crucial for understanding different MS disease courses.
rationales.753ba5e0dffbc730f4ff23d495623e9d: Offers key observations on the clinical features and evolution of the progressive phase of MS.
rationales.813237f9ab450891b35a34b8032c9b3d: Introduces standard clinical outcome measures like EDSS for assessing disability progression in MS.
rationales.891e0143fe813d9a76c3c27065d412a5: Provides a foundational understanding of MS natural history and diverse patterns of disability accumulation.
rationales.a62e6867fd8fd089666cf7bd38d78f49: Provides a contemporary overview of evolving epidemiological trends and redefinitions of MS clinical course.
rationales.bc0811208676c8e7d888b6beada8d402: Identifies distinct MS endophenotypes using high-dimensional blood signatures, linking them to different disease trajectories.
rationales.e5d9ce9e69921545837f9e2ab38589b0: Discusses the interplay of inflammatory and neurodegenerative processes driving MS disease course.
rationales.eb5a5bdc2622a6dbc7e8a235fd3b0965: Explores the utility of serum neurofilament light as a biomarker for monitoring progression in MS.
rationales.f9f2ed6dc044e99d40d42063c98de5d3: Presents a topographical model to conceptually integrate relapses and progression within the MS disease course.
rationales.ffdc650801631b8452f2f3cb7e113810: Analyzes the balance between demyelination and remyelination as pathological correlates of progressive MS.

rationales.047a3285ade63589276df8c2ce31e345: Investigates how disability accrues in MS, distinguishing relapse-associated worsening from progression independent of relapse activity.
rationales.166b2482b2068cf9b9df6aa85b62de9e: Reviews the evolving landscape of fluid biomarkers for MS diagnosis, prognosis, and monitoring treatment response.
rationales.17872ed3dfe1413dc47b2033f0d41a54: Delves into the pathogenic mechanisms and current treatment challenges for progressive forms of multiple sclerosis.
rationales.20bcb5fb1dd77d076bac428fe661032d: Provides a consensus statement on evaluating therapeutics specifically for pediatric multiple sclerosis, a specialized population.
rationales.3bd9e8c227d3165966ef76c53ae2f761: Presents the concept of 'smouldering MS' as a primary driver of disease progression, influencing long-term therapeutic strategies.
rationales.4271ebf6ac652293dbb06cf94322aebf: Offers a comprehensive overview of current and emerging disease-modifying therapies and their targets.
rationales.4ff24399cb96cba7a8171e70658a055b: Explores current advancements and future directions in therapies aimed at promoting remyelination in MS.
rationales.7056e08d0029bd609d3f554f36847367: Offers a historical perspective on MS research and the promise of new therapeutic developments.
rationales.730559cf4e13882f7715636e52cae7e7: Provides a broad historical and pathophysiological context for understanding MS and its pharmacological interventions.
rationales.746b4621c05f13bab10c519ef3efcb0c: Describes the development of the Multiple Sclerosis Functional Composite (MSFC) as a key outcome measure for clinical trials.
rationales.84ae88628effb18c490010bff232ac8e: Summarizes practical guideline recommendations for initiating, switching, and stopping DMTs in adults.
rationales.92d58c9a84372afaad9777a4390ed4cf: Discusses the challenges and methods for capturing disease activity and assessing treatment efficacy in MS clinical trials.
rationales.9fc11e3fc64f3720e33ee86aeb01376b: Articulates the paradigm shift towards early initiation of high-efficacy treatments in MS.
rationales.a62e6867fd8fd089666cf7bd38d78f49: Provides essential context on the evolving epidemiology and clinical course of multiple sclerosis.
rationales.e301a2244218a4c99ba9bd4e58008856: Details the landscape of high-efficacy therapies and the diverse mechanisms of action for RRMS.
rationales.ed25bc26506ce184116636cac37753af: Explains the molecular targets and mechanisms of various innovative DMTs, crucial for understanding mechanism classes.

rationales.08b736a81bbcebdccc0b17c33bbc093b: This review offers a comprehensive overview of EBV's role in MS, covering both epidemiological links and initial insights into molecular pathophysiology.
rationales.40b2412b060a65cc34f4d790102d0f8c: This study provides direct evidence of dysregulated EBV infection within the MS brain, offering a specific mechanistic insight.
rationales.41e92eda134066b55f2fc5e830b3a512: This foundational study demonstrates that primary EBV infection significantly increases the risk of developing MS in a large cohort.
rationales.5a886a4c09f88376451a066961b6bcfe: This paper explores the implications of EBV's role for potential immunotherapy strategies, addressing the 'path to prevention' aspect.
rationales.76d721c70acb143d14abc71c389bfbb6: This recent paper explicitly focuses on advancing the understanding from mere association to detailed mechanisms of EBV in MS pathogenesis.
rationales.8260be4d16f19ad2df7970c2366e5852: This paper places EBV within the broader context of environmental risk factors for MS, highlighting its early recognized importance.
rationales.e208a93e8b45ce632643d45c56c0b1fb: This paper delves into the complex interplay of EBV with other viruses and its role in driving the inflammatory cascade underlying MS.
rationales.e7f3950da40b2549bf7eb222752d21d3: This paper provides robust, recent epidemiological evidence for the strong association between EBV infection and increased MS risk.

rationales.08b736a81bbcebdccc0b17c33bbc093b: Offers a focused review on Epstein-Barr virus, vitamin D, and smoking as key established environmental risk factors.
rationales.2b31bec83ae7e825b93027a8460c3550: Provides a comprehensive epidemiological overview of genetic and environmental risk factors, including migration, vitamin D, and infections.
rationales.6d8511824acdb4d016410b6f880a6f95: Details non-infectious environmental factors like migration, diet, and behaviors that contribute to MS risk.
rationales.76d721c70acb143d14abc71c389bfbb6: Explores the mechanistic link between Epstein-Barr virus and MS, moving beyond mere association.
rationales.8260be4d16f19ad2df7970c2366e5852: Establishes the foundational role of infectious agents and the hygiene hypothesis in MS environmental risk.
rationales.af8af4099b657e7de72fca65f93f5dd7: Presents recent large-scale evidence from biobanks on the association between viral exposures, including EBV, and MS risk.
rationales.e2e2095e60a993f88584f7bb6cb2575d: Provides an updated perspective on the complex interplay of genetic, environmental, and lifestyle factors, including considerations for diverse populations.
rationales.e8805cba8751e2897f427b6b4dde49c8: Investigates the specific role of vitamin D levels in explaining racial and ethnic differences in MS incidence.

rationales.23b31e5ae980f7e08a8dab671ff0eb66: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of health disparities, inequities, and social determinants of health in MS, setting the stage for the concept.
rationales.4d110195d3d5a270332afc6890c82433: This review identifies higher comorbidity burdens in underrepresented minority and immigrant groups with MS, offering a specific health outcome disparity.
rationales.69437280a3e25e1eedbf6975c8ea512d: This paper provides a more detailed comparison of MS characteristics, including prevalence and phenotypes, between Caucasians and Latino Americans.
rationales.8e4e807bc24e72840008d12b0f81dc3f: This paper explores how race and ethnicity influence MS presentation and disease course, introducing clinical disparities.
rationales.915a0e4d10533766d6c79ea9ac4d50d0: This 'Atlas' highlights the global problem of MS with widespread inequity, providing a broad foundational context for the concept.
rationales.94453b7cf5e2600787d77a2b649b7eb2: This paper highlights the specific challenges of underdiagnosis, undertreatment, and worse outcomes for African American patients with MS.
rationales.9f163f607d3c7d032be3f517f017fc0c: This paper addresses the critical issue of underrepresentation of minority populations in MS clinical trials and the resulting lack of evidence-based treatment approaches.
rationales.aadaac3a695f0faa74dbab4e4d3a5cb6: This study delves deeper into the association between disease severity, socioeconomic status, and race, explicitly mentioning the role of systemic racism in MS outcomes.
rationales.aed83c9bd9b7103cf7b7c22bb51b4ee7: This study provides population-based prevalence estimates of MS in the US, demonstrating racial, ethnic, and geographic disparities.
rationales.dfdb25ae484eaab3b3a2553224cd9cbb: This paper demonstrates how health insurance coverage, a key socioeconomic factor, directly impacts access to disease-modifying therapies in MS.
rationales.ffd9ef7b9715e375c70fc5052d33c377: This paper highlights the underrecognition of MS burden in specific racial and ethnic groups and calls for further research into emerging disparities.

rationales.1d745f5a6158839375124de9b91bf4f5: This paper presents a specific treatment algorithm for tailored therapeutic strategies, offering deeper insights into management approaches.
rationales.730f37ee5280dd8a2485d8573094c34b: This paper introduces a key patient-based outcome measure (MSIS-29) for assessing the impact of MS symptoms, including fatigue, on quality of life.
rationales.73217a0acca5463cc45270a2be46abaf: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of fatigue mechanisms, evaluation, and treatment in MS.
rationales.7e5e80a56b9cbcbbb0464f41985afa7b: This article discusses a specific emerging pharmacological treatment (high-dose biotin) and its proposed mechanisms for improving MS-related disability, including fatigue.
rationales.8a66f5941e13d7c3b4770058c1ef189e: This meta-analysis summarizes evidence for common fatigue management interventions, offering an evidence-based foundation.
rationales.92d84cb253af1e42b0c4f0da7fb951af: This review focuses on the essential aspects of fatigue management, including the importance of early diagnosis.
rationales.faddc13f6a0b10c037c36554f70fc422: This review explores the neurodegenerative mechanisms underlying fatigue and discusses relevant biomarkers like kynurenines.
rationales.t4::t4-037: This paper investigates a specific non-pharmacological intervention, progressive resistance training, for its effects on physical fitness and quality of life.

rationales.08b736a81bbcebdccc0b17c33bbc093b: This paper delves into the specific role of Epstein-Barr virus as a well-established environmental risk factor, illustrating gene-environment interactions.
rationales.0a3d560e03f892d439433556b3670d5e: This paper uses eQTL studies to explore the functional impact of autoimmune risk alleles on immune cell gene expression, providing deeper mechanistic insights.
rationales.42e7b58c06c339adacb6202481e7a890: This paper investigates the genetic basis of MS disease severity and outcomes, moving beyond susceptibility to more complex genetic influences.
rationales.7056e08d0029bd609d3f554f36847367: This paper highlights the progress in mapping genes that influence MS risk and identifying environmental triggers, setting the stage for genetic susceptibility.
rationales.81a4314212e6f7786ce3ba1732ea9f7c: This paper provides an overview of MS genetics, explaining why it is not a Mendelian disease and highlighting classic HLA associations.
rationales.8260be4d16f19ad2df7970c2366e5852: This paper discusses how genetic susceptibility interacts with environmental factors, such as infections, to influence MS risk.
rationales.936e4eaff6e1046fc2642f018520a2b6: This paper applies Mendelian randomization, an advanced genetic epidemiological method, to identify potential drug targets based on genetic insights.
rationales.b0b77ce88e62754732811aa69e8c9f50: This landmark paper presents findings from a large-scale GWAS meta-analysis, identifying novel non-HLA susceptibility loci for MS.
rationales.e2e2095e60a993f88584f7bb6cb2575d: This paper broadly introduces the complex interplay of genetic, environmental, and lifestyle factors in MS risk and disease course.

rationales.0a3d560e03f892d439433556b3670d5e: It uses eQTL analysis to explore the genetic basis of immune cell function and dysfunction in autoimmunity.
rationales.0f219b3b7566ca251b64135ad6ff3f3d: This paper provides a foundational understanding of autoreactive T and B lymphocytes in MS pathogenesis.
rationales.1d7a73f4a8a010b888dad41d335d2d1a: This paper introduces the 'inside-out' vs. 'outside-in' paradigms for understanding the initiating events of MS autoimmunity.
rationales.2c6ba1ceaf63d51f3e0e49a62df681ec: It investigates the impact of B cell-rich meningeal inflammation on spinal cord pathology in MS.
rationales.76d721c70acb143d14abc71c389bfbb6: This paper delves into the mechanisms linking Epstein-Barr virus to MS pathogenesis, moving beyond mere association.
rationales.7e24728d3ff983ef01031c9209c9b0a4: This paper offers a general overview of inflammation and the autoimmune response to CNS self-antigens in MS.
rationales.836eed21167b7034dca4476ac7aeca63: It provides a broad perspective on the established role of autoimmunity and the interplay of immune, glial, and nerve cells in MS.
rationales.aeba3a20e2b4b5d0a39eabb4141dbf88: This paper reveals the complex effect of anti-CD20 therapy on CD20+ T cells, adding nuance to B cell targeting.
rationales.b4ebe41bd1a03714cf45c362d4bd8f0d: It focuses on the critical role of T helper cells as modulators of inflammation in multiple sclerosis.
rationales.be8ee73d7234208eb47d6eb2fd8b8677: It explains the fundamental process of how immune cells gain access to the central nervous system in MS.
rationales.c64b243a85cfddaecd548fbccfea7f49: This paper details the pathology and clinical implications of anti-CD20 B cell therapies in MS.
rationales.c8f4c7d0c541747d0d35a84a463a49fb: It explores the specific function of proinflammatory GM-CSF-producing B cells and their relevance to B cell depletion therapy.
rationales.dee58f114a139a4f89a7a83c200c1e9b: It utilizes single-cell transcriptomics to provide an advanced understanding of leukocyte composition and transcriptome in MS.
rationales.f8e4a4f3eb0e944fa80dc7ce99567a25: This paper focuses on the role of CNS macrophages (microglia) in progressive MS and their therapeutic implications.

rationales.10d94ef31b459d6a188fca3faf88fb44: This paper introduced the original McDonald Criteria, establishing the foundational principles of MS diagnosis.
rationales.1ab813d2f87432ead481a99a3c3909f7: This paper outlines the 2010 revisions, simplifying MRI criteria for dissemination in space and time.
rationales.5485207155f0032dc50ae25e431172a3: This paper details the 2005 revisions, strengthening the role of MRI in demonstrating dissemination in time and space.
rationales.5c115d16e7afcfccd68f70ebf95a311d: This paper offers an imaging perspective on the diagnostic work-up, discussing the evolution and future of MRI in relation to the McDonald criteria.
